description: MAC address prefix to LED driver type mappings
supported_drivers: BP5758D - I2C LED driver with 2-pin control (CLK/DAT)
PWM - Direct PWM control with individual pins per channel
SM2135 - I2C LED driver with 2-pin control (CLK/DAT)
notes: Add more MAC prefixes as you discover new bulb models
MAC prefixes should be first 8 characters (e.g., '10:5a:17')
If no match found, system falls back to pin detection
